creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #3)

After rebuilding 'devel/glib20' from latest Ports the /var/local/lib/dbus/machine-id is no longer needed.

% doas rm /var/local/lib/dbus/machine-id                 
% caja
% 

// NO ERRORS

Is it just Linux world having fun changing random things or there is more in depth explanation of these changes?

Regards,
vermaden
